## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data added
- [ ] Changelog + version updated if a new feature was added (see `CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] Design follows the Friends-Tab reference pattern (new UI only)
